01.png.question: What is the error and which file + line caused it?
01.png.correct_action: NoneType has no attribute 'run' in processor.py:47 — pipeline not initialized

02.png.question: What is the compile error and which file and line?
02.png.correct_action: borrow of moved value 'output' at pipeline.rs:89 — E0382

03.png.question: Why is the Save Payment button disabled? What field has an error?
03.png.correct_element: Card Number field at top of form
03.png.correct_action: Card number is invalid — fix the card number field to enable Save Payment button

04.png.question: Which file has the most errors and what is the first error on line 47?
04.png.correct_action: ProductList.tsx has 2 errors; line 47: Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'Product[]'

05.png.question: Why is the Merge button disabled and what action is required?
05.png.correct_action: Review required — @arch-bot must approve before merging

06.png.question: How many critical vulnerabilities are there and in which package?
06.png.correct_action: 1 critical vulnerability in semver (<7.5.2) — run npm audit fix

07.png.question: Which field has a validation error and what is the current invalid value?
07.png.correct_action: Max Retries has value 999 which is invalid (must be 1-10)

08.png.question: What URL is being blocked by CORS and from what origin?
08.png.correct_action: CORS blocks api.internal.corp/v1/users from localhost:3000 — server needs Access-Control-Allow-Origin header

09.png.question: What is the TypeScript error on line 23 and how to fix it?
09.png.correct_action: TS2345: undefined not assignable to Product[] — add null check or change type to Product[]

10.png.question: Which container failed and why?
10.png.correct_action: farscry-api failed — port 8080 already in use, run lsof -i :8080 to find what's using it

11.png.question: Which pod is failing and what is the root cause from the logs?
11.png.correct_action: CrashLoopBackOff (47 restarts): REDIS_URL env var not set

12.png.question: What is the error and which component + line caused it?
12.png.correct_action: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') at ProductList.jsx:47

13.png.question: Which field is currently focused/highlighted and what must the user enter?
13.png.correct_action: Address Line 1 is empty and required — user must enter their street address

14.png.question: Which file has a merge conflict and what are the two conflicting changes?
14.png.correct_action: HEAD uses authorization header with 401; feature/auth uses x-auth-token with 403

15.png.question: Which test failed and what was the assertion failure?
15.png.correct_element: Pipeline Tests › process › should extract text regions
15.png.correct_action: Expected 5 text regions, received 3 — at pipeline.test.ts:47

16.png.question: What is the Memory configuration and what button saves changes?
16.png.correct_element: Memory 512MB; Save button at bottom right
16.png.correct_action: Memory is 512 MB; click orange Save button to save configuration

17.png.question: What database error occurred and what is the fix?
17.png.correct_action: Column 'orders.payment_status' doesn't exist — run flask db migrate && flask db upgrade

18.png.question: What is the dangerous action button and what coordinates is it at?
18.png.correct_action: Red 'Delete Environment' button at approximately (440, 322) — irreversible action

19.png.question: Which endpoint is returning 500 errors and what does the latency suggest?
19.png.correct_action: /api/v1/extract is timing out (~4s) causing 500s — likely model loading issue

20.png.question: What settings are currently enabled and where is the Save button?
20.png.correct_element: Require 2FA (ON) + SSH key access (ON); Save button at (576, 478)
